loverugbyleague][http://www.itsrugby.co.uk/player_27345.html itsrugby] |updated = 29 April 2023 }} '''Paul Marcon''' (born 10 July 1995) is a [[French people|French]] professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a [[Rugby league positions#wing|winger]] for [[Toulouse Olympique]] in the [[Super League]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level.{{cite web|url=https://www.ladepeche.fr/article/2017/09/28/2654316-paul-marcon-un-olympien-en-mode-revelation.html|title=Paul Marcon, an Olympian in revelation|publisher= La Depeche|date=28 September 2017|accessdate=24 July 2018}} ==Background== He is a relative of former [[France national rugby league team|French international]] Serge Marcon.{{cite web|url=https://translate.google.co.uk/translate?hl=en&sl=fr&u=http://www.rugbyforumxiii.com/forum/viewtopic.php%3Ft%3D54670&prev=search|title=A human story that is written day by day|publisher= Sud Ouest|date=23 March 2013|accessdate=24 July 2018}} ==Domestic career== He then began his playing career at [[Villeneuve XIII RLLG|Villeneuve]] before joining [[Toulouse Olympique|Toulouse]] as a youngster.{{cite web|url=https://www.ladepeche.fr/article/2014/09/11/1949343-toulouse-ambitions-intactes.html|title=TO: ambitions intact|publisher=La Depeche|date=11 September 2014|accessdate=24 July 2018}} Marcon has spent time playing on loan for the [[Toulouse Broncos]].{{cite web|url=http://www.to13.com/actualites/to-broncos-vs-xiii-limouxin-linterview-de-paul-marcon/|title=TO Broncos vs. XIII Limouxin - Interview with Paul MARCON|publisher= TO13|date=22 October 2015|accessdate=24 July 2018}}{{cite web|url=https://translate.google.co.uk/translate?hl=en&sl=fr&u=http://rugbyxiii.unblog.fr/2017/09/28/&prev=search|title=PAUL MARCON, AN OLYMPIAN IN REVELATION|publisher=RUGBYXIII PRESS REVIEW|date=28 September 2017|accessdate=24 July 2018}} ===Toulouse Olympique=== In July 2020, Toulouse announced that Marcon had signed a contract extension until the end of the 2022 season.{{Cite web|url=https://www.rugby-league.com/article/56913/paul-marcon-signs-new-deal-with-toulouse-olympique|title=Paul Marcon signs new deal with Toulouse Olympique}} Macron played 16 games for Toulouse Olympique in the 2022 Super League season as they were relegated back to the RFL Championship after finishing bottom of the table.{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/toulouse-suffering-untold-damage-due-to-relegation-from-super-league/|title=Toulouse suffering "untold damage" due to relegation from Super League|website=www.loverugbyleague.com}} ==International career== Marcon has played for [[France national rugby league team|France]] at youth team level.{{cite web|url=https://www.toulouseblog.fr/rugby-le-toulouse-olympique-se-deplace-a-villeneuve-xiii/|title=Rugby: Toulouse Olympique moves to Villeneuve XIII|publisher=Toulouse Blog|date=20 December 2014|accessdate=24 July 2018}}{{cite web|url=https://www.ffr13.fr/actualite-international/edf-u18-36-joueurs-convoques/|title=EDF U18: 36 players convened|publisher=FFR XIII|date=17 April 2014|accessdate=24 July 2018}} He was selected in France 9s squad for the [[2019 Rugby League World Cup 9s]].{{cite web|date=2 October 2019|title=La liste des joueurs pour la Coupe du Monde dévoilée!|url=https://www.ffr13.fr/actualite-a-la-une/la-liste-des-joueurs-pour-la-coupe-du-monde-devoilee/|publisher=FFRXIII|accessdate=1 November 2019|language=French}}{{cite web|date=10 October 2019|title=XIII de France: Romain Puso remplace Lilian Albert, forfait!|url=https://www.ffr13.fr/actualite-a-la-une/xiii-de-france-romain-puso-remplace-lilian-albert-forfait/|publisher=FFR XIII|accessdate=1 November 2019|language=French}} ==References== {{reflist|30em}} ==External links== *[http://www.to13.com/player/marcon-paul/ Toulouse Olympique profile]
